session_context.target: Add a BrainstormAgent to the AgentForge pipeline that generates interactive brainstorm artifacts using the May 2026 schema. Theme: game_dev_arcade (neon/cyberpunk). No stubs. Full production implementation.

existing_system.safety: src/safety/safety-guard.ts — all agents run through guardAction()
existing_system.tests_must_pass: npm test must pass at 230+ tests before and after

coding_standards.observer_pattern: Emit agent events through agentEventBus. No polling.
coding_standards.safety: Never bypass guardAction. Never bypass kill switch.
coding_standards.agent_contract: Return { success, data?, logs[] } from every execute() path.
coding_standards.no_ui_in_agents: BrainstormAgent returns structured data only. UI renders in Next.js components.
coding_standards.tdd: Write failing test first. Then implement. Then confirm pass.

deliverables.purpose: TypeScript types for brainstorm artifact schema.
types: BrainstormOption: { id: string, label: string, rationale: string, locked: boolean }
BrainstormQuestion: { id: string, text: string, type: 'single'|'multi'|'true_false'|'ranked'|'numeric_scale'|'abc_match', options: BrainstormOption[] }
BrainstormSection: { id: string, title: string, questions: BrainstormQuestion[] }
BrainstormArtifact: { title: string, theme: string, sections: BrainstormSection[], metadata: { capturedAt: string, projectSlug: string } }

deliverables.purpose: Generates a structured brainstorm artifact from a project description.

logs: Brainstorm artifact generated: N sections, M questions

requirements: Validate input.context.projectDescription is non-empty string — return success:false if missing
Default theme to 'game_dev_arcade' when not provided
Generate minimum 4 sections with minimum 3 questions each
Use backend LLM if available via input.context.prompt pattern, fall back to deterministic template
Generate projectSlug from first 5 words of projectDescription kebab-cased
All question types used across sections: single, multi, true_false, ranked

deliverables.purpose: Vitest tests — write these FIRST, run to confirm fail, then implement agent.
required_tests: execute() with valid projectDescription returns success: true and artifact with sections
execute() with missing projectDescription returns success: false with descriptive log
each question type is one of the 6 allowed values
theme defaults to game_dev_arcade when not provided
projectSlug is kebab-case derived from projectDescription

deliverables.change: Add import { BrainstormAgent } from './brainstorm/BrainstormAgent' and new BrainstormAgent() in createAgents() array

deliverables.purpose: POST /api/brainstorm — generates and returns a brainstorm artifact.
requirements: Auth: check AGENT_TOKEN header same pattern as /api/agent/run
Safety: check killSwitch.isActive() — return 503 if active
Return artifact JSON with 200 on success, 400 on validation error, 500 on execution error

tdd_order: 2. Run: cd agentforge_autonomous && npm test -- src/agents/__tests__/brainstorm.test.ts
3. Confirm: tests fail with 'cannot find module' or similar — correct failure
